title: vernonia gigantea subsp. ovalifolia
intro: Vernonia gigantea subsp. ovalifolia, also known as a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family, is a subspecies of Vernonia gigantea, a tropical plant native to Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Vernonia gigantea subsp. ovalifolia include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of fever and pain. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
